title: plantago bellidioides f. runcinata
intro: Plantago bellidioides f. runcinata, also known as the rough-leaved plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain plant, which belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Plantago bellidioides f. runcinata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing, making it a popular natural remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various conditions, including skin irritations, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
